0.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the upper lobe of the right lung

1.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the superior segments of the right lower lobe

2.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the basal segments of the right lower lobe

3.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the basal segments of the left lower lobe

4.text: Interlobular septal thickening in the superior segments of the right lower lobe

5.text: Interlobular septal thickening in the basal segments of the right lower lobe with a cobblestone appearance
